fields.explainEn: ID of the cluster where the application is located.

Final status of the application.

fields.explainZh: 根据ResourceManager的应用程序状态,有效值是YarnApplicationState枚举的成员：NEW、NEW_SAVING、SUBMITTED、ACCEPTED、RUNNING、FINISHED、FAILED、KILLED。
fields.explainEn: According to the application status of ResourceManager, the valid members of the YarnApplicationState enumeration include NEW, NEW_SAVING, SUBMITTED, ACCEPTED, RUNNING, FINISHED, FAILED, and KILLED.
Application type.
User who started the application program.
Number of dead data nodes.

fields.explainZh: 死亡数据节点占活动节点和死亡节点总和的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of dead data nodes to the total number of active and dead nodes.

fields.explainZh: 已经从集群中解除的死亡节点数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of dead nodes that have been decommissioned from the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 已经从集群中解除的数据节点数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of data nodes that have been decommissioned from the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 正在从集群中解除的数据节点数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of data nodes being decommissioned from the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 已经从集群中解除的活动节点数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of active nodes that have been decommissioned from the cluster.

fields.explainZh: 活动数据节点占活动节点和死亡节点总和的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of active data nodes to the total number of active and dead nodes.
Number of damaged data nodes.

fields.explainZh: 节点是否已从集群中解除。
fields.explainEn: Whether the node has been decommissioned from the cluster.
Host where the node is located.

fields.nameEn: Dead DataNode Time Since Last Contact
fields.explainZh: 与名称节点最后一次通讯间隔时长。
fields.explainEn: Duration since last communication with the name node.

fields.explainZh: 节点的主机名称和节点地址的字符串拼接，当前指标组数据的唯一标识。
fields.explainEn: Combination of the host name and address of the node, which is the unique identifier for current index group data.
IP address of the host where the node is located.

fields.explainZh: 处于解除状态节点的主机名称。
fields.explainEn: Host name of the node in decommissioned state.

fields.nameZh: 构建文件中等待被复制块数
fields.nameEn: Under Replicated Blocks,In files under construction

fields.explainZh: 节点的主机名称和节点地址的字符串拼接，当前指标组数据的唯一标识。
fields.explainEn: Combination of the host name and address of the node, which is the unique identifier for current index group data.

fields.explainZh: 非活跃状态副本节点中的复制块数。
fields.explainEn: Number of replicated blocks in an inactive duplicate node.
